events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked to assess a situation based on a scenario: The photo is blocked by packaging and glare, so identifying details can't be read. Reference material: project support standards, MSS SP-58. We need to decide pass/fail/needs_more_info, risk, work stage (rough-complete per context), component conditions, percent complete, etc. Since the photo is unreadable, we can't verify compliance. So decision likely "needs_more_info". Risk? If it's hangers & supports, and we can't see them, it's potentially risky but we don't know. Could be medium? Work stage is rough-complete. Component conditions: empty because we can't see any defects. Percent complete: maybe guess 90%? But it's rough-complete, typically might be near 100% but not closed out. Value: not asked. Sound source, event time, rate, order, workable: not applicable. Findings: "Photo obstructed by packaging and glare; identification and connection details not visible." Actions: "Remove packaging, clean glare, and reinspect hanger and support to verify compliance with project support standards and MSS SP-58." Rationale: brief. References: project support standards, MSS SP-58. Confidence: maybe 0.9 because we're sure we can't see.

Output JSON.
